span.p:
Hi, welcome to ABC Mutual Fund Services. What service would you like to use?
Quick Suggestions:
- Portfolio Valuation
- Explore Funds
- Transaction History

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is contact number valid?
Add Validation - Must be 10 digits only

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Kindly select one of your portfolios.
Quick Suggestion:
-DSP_123
-QTF-456
Portfolio options must be fetched from a json.
If there is no record against the provided number, show some meaningful messaage and give option to invest

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Your Portfolio {Portfolio Number} valuation is {Amount} on {current_date}
Show total amount invested in selected portfolio(fund) from the json.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Kindly provide a time period.
Quick suggestion:
-Current Financial Year
-Previous Financial Year
Custom input must be a valid date format.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Show list of transactions.
If there is no transactions for the mobile number provided show meaningful message.
Use Table rich response to show last 3 transactions:
Date, Portfolio, Amount (from json)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Do you want to invest more?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Thank you for using our services

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Kindly select one of categories to see funds:
-Equity
-Debt
-Hybrid
Categories must be coming from json

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Select one of below fund:
-ABC Nifty 50 Fund
-ABC Hybrid Fund
Show options as quick suggestion chips based on category selected from json

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Selected Fund Details:
It has ratio as 30%(Debt)-30%(Large Cap Equity)-20%(Mid Cap Equity)-20%(Small Cap Equity) with a 15% CAGR.
For more details: https-external-dummy-link
You can use any random details to show up on this step
Quick suggestion:
-Invest
-Return to Main menu

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Has customer already provided contact number?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Enter amount in Rupees.
1000, 2000, 5000, 1000
Show amount in quick suggestion chips.
If user entered any other amount then it must be < 50,000.
Validate the entered amount must be a number.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Thank you for choosing our services.
Store date,amount,fund_name in json
